zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER於1180年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫時，她的父親Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV30歲，母親Ida d'Avesnes23歲。她於1196年與Philippe D'AIRE在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1254年5月15日享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER于1180年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫时，她的父亲Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV30岁，母亲Ida d'Avesnes23岁。她于1196年与Philippe D'AIRE在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1254年5月15日享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER was born in 1180, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, was 30 and her mother, Ida d'Avesnes, was 23. She married Philippe D'AIRE in 1196, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 15 May 1254, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER est née en 1180, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ida d'Avesnes, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe D'AIRE en 1196, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1254, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER 1180 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV 30 und ihre Mutter Ida d'Avesnes 23. Sie hat 1196 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Philippe D'AIRE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1254 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER è nata il nel 1180 nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ida d'Avesnes, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Philippe D'AIRE nel 1196, nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1254, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix DE SAINT-OMERが1180年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Saint-Omer IVは30歳，母Ida d'Avesnesは23歳であった。1196年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーでPhilippe D'AIREと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1254年5月15日に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER(이)가 1180년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida d'Avesnes(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1196년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 Philippe D'AIRE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 5월 15일 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER nasceu em 1180, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ida d'Avesnes, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe D'AIRE em 1196, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1254, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER родилась в 1180 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida d'Avesnes, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe D'AIRE в 1196 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 мая 1254 г. в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrix DE SAINT-OMER nació en 1180, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Saint-Omer IV, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ida d'Avesnes, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Philippe D'AIRE en 1196, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1254, a la edad de 74 años.
